subcodes.first_line: O Aba'l-Ma'álí! Spread wide the hem of thy seeking, for the ocean of inner meanings desireth to cast upon thee the pearls of knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابا المعالی ان ابسط ذیل طلبک ان بحر المعانی اراد ان یقذف علیک لئالی العلم
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @chastisement and requital, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
